headline: ServiceNow Faces 2026 Vote On Written Consent And Governance Trade Offs
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) has issued an investor presentation addressing a shareholder proposal on the right to act by written consent. The presentation comes ahead of the company’s 2026 annual meeting, where shareholders will vote on the measure. The board of directors is recommending that investors vote against granting shareholders the right to act by written consent. Management highlights existing shareholder engagement tools and governance practices in arguing against the...

headline: Shares of several energy companies are trading lower after amid increased uncertainty in the banking sector after Saudi's SNB said it can't provide further money to Credit Suisse because it can't go above 10% ownership. Investors fear of a potential financial crisis, which could have a negative impact on oil demand.
